counter.name: should_have_escalated_but_didnt
counter.description: done tasks counted autonomous that carry a non-transient heiler_classification (real-bug/bad-spec/conflict) yet never raised operator_escalation

counter.name: tasks_without_cost_data
counter.description: done tasks with no real metered cost — subscription-stamped $0 runs PLUS NULL-cost runs; the cost trend's blind spot. Shrinks only when a task gains real metered cost, never when a subscription run is stamped $0

counter.name: silent_blocks
counter.description: settled blocked tasks (self-healer done) with no operator_escalation event — blocks that bypass the operator; transient self-healing retries are excluded

counter.name: operator_corrected_pct
counter.description: share of classified escalations the operator later corrected (heiler_classification_corrected) — the misclassification guardrail; held under 10%

counter.name: fail_nights
counter.description: recorded red gate nights — the streak's antagonist
